【黑道+美妇+征服+爽文+多女主】
 【 前面五章慢热，后期暴爽，看完十章后，要是觉得不爽，你来砍我！】
王小虎从乡下闯入江城，本想安稳度日，却因一场冲突卷入江湖漩涡。
结识钱佳佳，搭上崔猛，更被高冷女王秦月凛强行收为保镖。
身怀秘术，战力无双，他在黑道中步步惊心，一路逆袭。
美女投怀，兄弟相随，权势滔天。
曾经被人瞧不起的乡巴佬，如今执掌江城地下秩序。
一遇风云便化龙，今日起，我王小虎，就是江城的天！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ef3a70b17ffaad2ccdd2443e7fa539fa","author":"粉笔写春秋","author_id":"","book_id":"7589320672833178686","book_name":"黑道迷情","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":826,"name":"黑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=826&name=黑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1460,"name":"都市江湖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1460&name=都市江湖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7589320768626901566","read_count":"30829","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"777559"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"360","tags":"都市日常,都市,多女主,大小姐,大佬,黑道,都市江湖","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c598072571bf84759053b0ae4b6b9276~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285887&x-signature=0ltugnExS0qfOWgTkpDY23KP3JA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1002388442083900","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"28"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321220447C0CC7654049CB9D77D05"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"re
